title: App Settings - General - Privacy Policy no wifi [New]
scenario: Privacy Policy page shows "Something is wrong" error when WiFi is off and navigating from General settings
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi on the Android device.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or your profile icon to access the side menu.
5. Tap on 'Settings' or 'Account' to open app settings.
expected: The Privacy Policy content should load and display within the app.
